STAB-026

Chat Unify 4.4.0

Enterprise platform home · Connect hub · public download lane.

What's new

  • Platform home — founder-focused hero; 48-hour MVP path collapsible
  • Connect tab — integrations API, webhook triggers, platform catalog
  • Loop hero — Verify & Act + Audit Trail above the fold
  • Prompt Forge — missions, cursor bridge, try-free path
  • Download — public .dmg at /downloads/chat-unify-mac-v1.dmg

Upgrade

Download latest .dmg · replace app in Applications · Cmd+Q reopen. Or run bash scripts/chat-unify-stack-boot.sh for browser-only.

Downloads · Platform home

Technical overview · GitHub
